holdings.infoBox: PTLC is an equity ETF with a total of 504 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.83%, Apple at 6.71%, Microsoft at 4.56%, Amazon.com at 3.66%, and Alphabet at 3.31%.

overview.description: The Pacer Trendpilot US Large Cap ETF (PTLC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pacer Trendpilot US Large Cap index. The fund tracks an index that allocates to a proprietary US large-cap index and/or 3-month US T-bills, according to momentum. PTLC was launched on Jun 11, 2015 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Pacer Trendpilot US Large Cap Index
